title: More Gold
description: Ever thought that Minecraft needed more golden food? Then this is your mod! This mod adds more than 5+ honey Foods.
body:
Ever thought that Minecraft needed more golden food? Then this is your mod! This mod adds more than 5+ gold Foods. Use it to replenish those health and hunger points and have some good buffs.

## Dependencies

- [Lot's More Food](https://modrinth.com/mod/lots-more-food)

## Loaders

- [Bedrock](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/more-gold)
- **Fabric**

## Block List

- Golden Fruit Crop
- Golden Fruit Sapling
- Golden Log
- Golden Wood
- Stripped Golden Log
- Stripped Golden Wood

## Item List

- Golden Banana
- Golden Grape
- Golden Lemon
- Golden Orange
- Golden Strawberry
- Enchanted Golden Banana
- Enchanted Golden Grape
- Enchanted Golden Lemon
- Enchanted Golden Orange
- Enchanted Golden Strawberry

## FAQ

### Can I add this to my mod pack?

Sure, as long as you give proper credit and follow the license.

### Are you going to downgrade to older versions (ie; 1.15, 1.12, 1.8)?

I will if there is enough demand for a certain version and I have time to.

## Maven

```gradle
dependencies {
    modImplementation "maven.modrinth:more-gold:fabric-${project.moregold_version}"
}
```
[More Information](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/tutorials/maven/)
